title: Senior AI Engineer (Document Extraction)
company_focus: AI-powered insurance pricing and underwriting platform
description:
About hyperexponential (hx)

At hyperexponential, we’re building the AI-powered platform
that enables the world’s most critical decisions in a $7
trillion industry, which risks to take, and how to price
them. These are the decisions that shape real-world
outcomes: whether rockets successfully launch into space,
autonomous vehicles make it to market, or communities
recover after major storms.

Until now, insurance has been making billion-dollar
decisions using outdated tools. We’re changing that. Our
platform brings together data, AI, and human expertise to
give insurers the fastest path from submission to decision -
helping them move faster, act smarter, and take on more risk
with confidence.

Backed by a16z, Highland Europe, and Battery Ventures, we’re
scaling globally - already trusted by nearly 50 of the
world’s largest insurers, with zero churn and billions in
premiums flowing through hx.

What began as a single product in one market has rapidly
evolved into a multi-product, multi-territory platform
powering every stage of pricing and underwriting. AI is at
the core of what we do - from building the world’s first
domain-specific AI peer programmer for insurance (think
GitHub Copilot with a PhD in actuarial science) to shaping
agentic workflows that reinvent how this industry operates.

What makes hx different is the people who build it. Here,
impact isn’t tied to title or tenure; it’s defined by the
challenges you take on and the discipline you bring.
Surrounded by peers who stretch you, you’ll do the best,
hardest work of your life in a company engineered to endure.

If that sounds like you, join us in building what comes
next.

About the AI Ingestion team

AI is central to hx’s ambition to reinvent how insurers move
from submission to decision. A significant part of that
challenge begins before pricing even starts: transforming
messy, inconsistent, insurance-specific documents into
structured, reliable data that underwriters can trust. The
AI Ingestion team owns this critical first mile.

Within this team, we build and scale document extraction and
data transformation systems tailored to the complexity of
specialty insurance. We operate at the intersection of large
language models, classical document understanding
techniques, evaluation-driven design, and production-grade
infrastructure. Our outputs directly determine whether
insurers can automate workflows across multiple lines of
business with confidence.

As a Senior AI Engineer focused on Document Extraction, you
will take ownership of solving high-stakes, insurance-
specific extraction problems. Over the next 6 to 12 months,
your mission will be to automate key data extraction and
cleansing workflows across core specialty lines, hitting
strict accuracy and consistency benchmarks while ensuring
our systems are robust, observable, and built to scale.

What you’ll be doing

- Designed and delivered high-accuracy document extraction
  pipelines that automated key data capture across multiple
  specialty lines of business, enabling measurable
  reductions in manual processing during customer go-live.
- Built and productionised data cleansing and manipulation
  capabilities within our ingestion system, improving
  consistency and reliability of downstream pricing inputs.
- Defined and enforced rigorous evaluation-driven development
  practices, creating robust evaluation sets and benchmarks
  that guided model and pipeline improvements.
- Improved our evaluation infrastructure for complex ingestion
  scenarios, enabling faster iteration cycles and clearer
  visibility into performance trade-offs.
- Partnered directly with customers during go-live, diagnosing
  and resolving integration bottlenecks and production
  issues to ensure smooth technical rollouts.
- Led technical deep-dives and brainstorming sessions to
  unblock complex extraction challenges, raising the bar on
  experimentation, knowledge sharing, and solution design
  across the team.

What you’ll need to have done

- Built and deployed document extraction or document
  understanding systems that achieved measurable accuracy
  improvements in production environments.
- Designed evaluation frameworks and datasets that enabled
  rigorous, repeatable measurement of model or pipeline
  performance.
- Delivered data processing or transformation systems that
  were scalable, observable, and maintainable under real-
  world load.
- Taken end-to-end ownership of complex AI features, from
  problem framing and experimentation through to production
  rollout and monitoring.
- Collaborated across engineering, product, and customer-
  facing teams to ship solutions that solved real user
  problems rather than isolated research challenges.
- Raised technical standards within your team by improving
  experimentation practices, documentation, or review
  processes beyond what was originally expected.

You’re unlikely to thrive here if

- You prefer clearly defined, static problem statements over
  ambiguous, evolving real-world challenges.
- You optimise for elegant prototypes rather than production-
  grade systems that must endure.
- You are uncomfortable taking full ownership of outcomes,
  including customer impact and operational reliability.
- If reading our Culture Document leaves you feeling neutral
  rather than energised, hx may not be the place where
  you’ll do your best work. We’re building something that
  asks for commitment and conviction, and we want you to
  feel excited by the opportunity to grow with us.

Compensation

At hx, we’re committed to salary transparency. You’ll always
have clarity on pay early in the process - our Talent
Partner will share details with you during initial
conversations - and we’re working towards publishing salary
information for all roles globally.

Because we’re building at the intersection of
technology/SaaS and insurance, our roles don’t always map
neatly onto traditional benchmarks. Our approach is to
design compensation that’s competitive in the market, fair
across teams, and aligned with the impact our people make.

Equity: We offer equity across all roles at hx, making it a
significant component of total compensation. Your talent
partner will be able to share more details about this.

Benefits

- £5,000 training and conference budget for individual and
  group development.
- 25 days of holiday plus 8 bank holidays (33 days total).
- Company pension scheme via Penfold.
- Mental health support and therapy via Spectrum.life.
- Individual wellbeing allowance via Juno.
- Private healthcare insurance through AXA.
- Income protection and Life Insurance.
- Cycle to Work Scheme

Additional perks

- Top-spec equipment (laptop, screens, adjustable desks,
  etc.).
- Regular remote and in-person hackathons, lunch and learns,
  socials, and game nights.
- Exceptional opportunities for personal development and
  growth as we build something remarkable together.

Interview Process

- Initial call with Talent team (30 minutes)
- Manager Interview (60 minutes)
- Technical Assessment (e.g., code review, system design) (120
  minutes)
- Values Interview with Tech Leadership (60 minutes)
- Offer

Our commitment to Diversity

hxer's are at the centre of everything we build. We know
that progress depends on diverse perspectives, and we are
committed to creating an environment where everyone can
thrive, grow, and make an impact. We recognise there is
always more to do, and we take responsibility for shaping a
workplace that is not only diverse but genuinely inclusive.

Diversity is not just the right thing to do, it is key to
solving the complex challenges we choose to take on. By
welcoming people from all backgrounds and experiences, we
strengthen our ability to question assumptions, push
boundaries, and design solutions that endure.

If you’re energised by complexity and motivated to grow, we
encourage you to apply and join our global team.

Next steps

If this opportunity resonates with you, we encourage you to
apply or share it with your connections! Our dedicated
talent team reviews all applications, and we promise to
provide feedback regardless of the outcome.

For more information about applying and to view other
opportunities, you can visit our careers page.

Please note that background checks will be conducted as part
of the hiring process to ensure compliance with our
governance policies. We handle all background checks
sensitively and in full compliance with relevant
regulations. All applicant data will be processed in
accordance with data protection regulations and our privacy
policy.

Define and enforce evaluation-driven development practices, creating robust evaluation sets and benchmarks for model improvements
Improve evaluation infrastructure for complex ingestion scenarios to enable faster iteration cycles and performance visibility
Partner directly with customers during go-live to diagnose integration bottlenecks and resolve production issues

use_cases: Automated extraction of structured data from messy insurance-specific documents
Data cleansing and transformation for pricing and underwriting workflows
Document understanding for specialty insurance lines of business
Production-grade ingestion systems that enable insurers to automate workflows with confidence
Evaluation-driven AI systems for high-stakes insurance decision-making
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves hands-on work building and deploying LLM-
based document extraction systems, including designing
evaluation frameworks, productionizing models, and directly
integrating with customers. The engineer takes end-to-end
ownership from experimentation through production rollout,
working directly on AI systems rather than just supporting
infrastructure.
